$comment: Paperwik build-time sidecar manifest. Read by install.ps1 step (c5) to download Obsidian community plugin binaries from GitHub Releases. NOT an Obsidian config file — paperwik-specific. Never copied to user vault. Format: each entry has the Obsidian plugin id (what goes in community-plugins.json), the GitHub owner/repo (to query Releases API), and any plugin-specific notes.

plugins.note: Primary query engine for paperwik's index.md dashboards. Security-hardened via data.json seed (enableDataviewJs: false).

Slide deck rendering from markdown. Passive render layer — no auto-write risk. v0.5.2 pointed at wrong repo MSzturc/marp-slides (404); v0.5.3 corrected to Obsidian community-plugins.json's actual marp-slides registry entry.
Floating page previews prevent spatial disorientation in dense entity graphs.
Chronological anchor. No styles.css in release assets as of 2026-04.
Outliner-style context trees for global search + backlinks.
Click-zoom-pan for embedded images. Intercepts click events only; no markdown rewriting.
